claim_text: Synthetic claim: Qiskit produces fewer two-qubit gates than pytket on QFT circuits.
notes: Compilation-style reversed control built by swapping the stated winner for a stable pytket-lower-gate-count relation.

claim_text: Synthetic claim: Qiskit produces fewer two-qubit gates than pytket on GHZ circuits.
notes: Same construction as qft control, but with a GHZ software-stack workload family.

claim_text: Synthetic claim: Qiskit produces fewer two-qubit gates than pytket on arithmetic circuits.
notes: Arithmetic-family compilation reversed control with the stated direction opposite the constructed evidence.

claim_text: Synthetic claim: the deeper reference circuit uses fewer two-qubit gates than the shallow reference circuit.
notes: Adversarial compilation claim with a false lower-is-better direction.

claim_text: Synthetic claim: QAOA p=1 achieves a higher MaxCut objective than QAOA p=2.
notes: Optimization-style false-direction control for a higher-is-better objective metric.

claim_text: Synthetic claim: QAOA p=1 achieves a higher Max-2-SAT objective than QAOA p=2.
notes: Optimization-style reversed control using the same p=1 versus p=2 comparator family as the internal surface.

claim_text: Synthetic claim: optimizer Adam reaches lower energy error than optimizer tk.
notes: Lower-is-better optimization metric with the stated winner deliberately reversed.

claim_text: Synthetic claim: optimizer COBYLA converges in fewer iterations than optimizer SPSA.
notes: False-direction convergence claim with a discrete iteration-count metric.
